grammatical-notes.וַיֹּאמֶר: Conjunction 'va' (waw-consecutive) + Verb 'yomer' (Qal Imperfect 3ms). The waw-consecutive signals the next sequential event in the narrative chain.
grammatical-notes.יְהִי: Verb, Qal Jussive 3ms. From 'hayah' (to be). The Jussive mood expresses a command or authoritative desire.
grammatical-notes.אוֹר: Noun. Light. Notably anarthrous (no article), signaling the qualitative force of the phenomenon.
grammatical-notes.וַיְהִי־אוֹר: Conjunction 'va' (waw-consecutive) + Verb 'yehi' (Qal Imperfect 3ms) + Noun 'or'. The sequence shows the immediate result of the preceding command.

dictionary-meaning.וַיֹּאמֶר: Then Elohim expressed his sovereign will through speech and commanded — disclosing the sequential sequence (Rule 74) and the authoritative tone of a creative decree (Rule 13).
dictionary-meaning.יְהִי: Let existence be granted to — disclosing the Jussive mood of 'being' (Rule 9).
dictionary-meaning.אוֹר: Light — the physical phenomenon of electromagnetic radiation, rendered qualitatively due to the lack of an article (Rule 75).
dictionary-meaning.וַיְהִי־אוֹר: And light instantly came into being — disclosing the absolute efficacy and immediate result of the command (Rule 74).

אמר.chosen: expressed his sovereign will through speech and commanded
אמר.reason: The context of the initial creation act requires a term for authoritative decree rather than casual conversation.

main-translation: ***Then Elohim decreed***, '***Let existence be granted to light***'; ***and light instantly came into being.***

main-translation-explanation.Then Elohim decreed: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Rejected 'said' as too thin. 'Decreed' captures the authoritative tone of a creative command (Rule 13) without being overly wordy.
main-translation-explanation.Let existence be granted to light: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Captures the Jussive force of the verb 'Yehi' and preserves the qualitative force of the anarthrous noun 'Or' (Rule 75).
main-translation-explanation.light instantly came into being: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Discloses the efficacious result of the Waw-consecutive sequence (Rule 74).

rejected-translations.reason: Thin agency and masks the authoritative command tone of the Hebrew.
Traditional rendering that fails to disclose the specific 'Granting of Existence' implied by the Jussive 'Yehi'.
